location.office_time_required: Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays (Anchor Days); certain positions may require additional in-office workdays

level_signals: 6+ years experience in investment banking, private equity, and/or corporate finance
Compensation range $190,000 - $220,000 base in San Francisco, consistent with Senior IC
Partners directly with CFO and C-level decision-makers on high-profile strategic projects

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years experience in investment banking, private equity, and/or corporate finance
must_haves.qualifier: investment banking, private equity, and/or corporate finance

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Excellent financial modeler with analytical mindset
Positive attitude with high aptitude to learn new things quickly. Team player eager to further develop and grow with us
Demonstrate intellectual curiosity, problem-solving skills, and hunger to continually up-level current approaches and processes
Strong work ethic, reliability, and attention to detail - "get it done" attitude

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Prior experience managing Free Cash Flow (both direct and indirect method) a plus
Experience with a high-growth SaaS company
Experience with Netsuite, Workday, Zip, and planning tools

scope.surface: Corporate Finance — 3-statement forecasting, management reporting, board materials, equity tracking, long-range planning, AI-augmented financial modeling
primary_metrics_inferred: Equity burn rate and shareholder pool
core_responsibilities: Partner with Finance, Accounting, and cross-functional partners to mint and report 3-statement forecasts
Drive critical monthly & quarterly management reporting including Budget vs Actuals analyses, dashboards, and Board materials
Pioneer AI-augmented financial modeling for Corporate Finance
Develop recurring process to collect capital expenditures, tax, and other key inputs from the team
Oversee equity burn rate and shareholder pool tracking
Partner with Consolidations and Business teams to develop long range plan and evolve forecasting process
Tackle new & evolving priorities for the team, including ad hoc analyses
